steps.title: Identify the role of the coefficient
steps.content: The formula converts kelvins to Fahrenheit. Substitute $h=467.33$ and isolate the fraction: $$467.33-32=\frac{9(v-273.15)}{5}.$$

steps.title: Interpret in context
steps.content: So $435.33=\frac{9(v-273.15)}{5}$, giving $v-273.15=\frac{5\cdot 435.33}{9}=241.85$ and $v=515$. The answer is 515.
